title: Customer Project Coordinator - Product Management
required_skills: CRM system maintenance and data management
Statistics and report generation for management
bonus_skills: Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Marketing, or Economics
matched_skills: Cross-functional stakeholder coordination (Hapag-Lloyd: project teams, stakeholders, product owners; HSBC: Product, Engineering, Marketing, C-suite)
Statistics and reporting (Power BI dashboards, KPI reports, burn-rate reports, executive sprint review reports)
Written communication and documentation (meeting facilitation, presentation preparation, newsletters)
Support of sales projects and marketing campaigns (IoT GTM strategy, B2B campaign operations at Intelligent Power Corporation)
Forecast/planning support (agile sprint planning, programme status tracking)
Data entry and system maintenance (booking reports, project data updates at ECE Group)
missing_skills: CRM system experience (e.g., Salesforce, SAP CRM, HubSpot) — not listed in CV tools
Order processing and order confirmation workflows
Price checks and price determination in a sales/manufacturing context
Quotation preparation in a B2B product/manufacturing environment
Direct customer-facing support role (telephone/written helpdesk experience)
core_responsibilities: Process customer inquiries and incoming orders; prepare quotations, calculations, and order confirmations
Provide telephone and written support for existing and new customers
Coordinate with field sales, logistics, and production teams
Maintain and update customer data in the CRM system; generate statistics and reports for sales management
Handle complaints and support sales projects and marketing campaigns
recommended_emphasis: Highlight cross-functional coordination experience from Hapag-Lloyd (agile sprints, product owners, logistics dependencies) and HSBC (6-workstream programme coordination) — directly maps to coordinating sales, logistics, and production teams
Emphasise report generation and data management skills (Power BI, Excel dashboards, KPI tracking) as proxy for CRM-based statistics and sales reporting
Surface the ECE Group role's project data updates and spreadsheet optimisation as evidence of data maintenance discipline, closest analogue to CRM data upkeep
Reframe Intelligent Power Corporation GTM and campaign operations experience to demonstrate familiarity with sales cycle support and marketing campaign coordination
Lead with multilingual capability (English, German, Chinese) — a tangible asset for customer support in a global aerospace manufacturer serving international clients
Mention B2B stakeholder communication and written documentation (HSBC newsletters, Hapag-Lloyd executive reports) to cover the written customer support requirement

company_info.size_raw: Howmet Aerospace is a publicly traded global aerospace components manufacturer (NYSE: HWM) with approximately 22,000+ employees — inferred from public knowledge; not extractable from JD text and LinkedIn profile not fetched (match_score < 50)
